title: Decide additive contract follow-up path
goal: Decide whether additive weight deltas belong in the shared policy.weight_adjustment.v1 contract or remain outside contract-bound heimlern proposal emission.

acceptance.assertion: A decision record states whether additive deltas should be added to the shared contract or kept out of contract-bound emission.
If additive deltas are needed, the separate cross-repository contract follow-up is specified without changing heimlern emission in this task.

metadata.decision: Keep additive deltas outside contract-bound policy.weight_adjustment.v1 emission.

decision_summary.future_follow_up_condition: Only if reviewed producer evidence shows additive external semantics are necessary and cannot be represented by relative or absolute deltas.

validated_acceptance.decision-recorded: Heimlern PR #193 adds ADR-0005 and links it from the ADR index and policy lifecycle documentation.
validated_acceptance.contract-follow-up-clear: ADR-0005 states no immediate metarepo follow-up is needed; any future additive external semantics require a separate contract-design follow-up before heimlern emission changes.

validation: GitHub checks for PR #193 passed: Analyze actions/python/rust, CodeQL, build-test, schema-validate, repo-root, templates.

Local before merge: py_compile for OLA/coherence/doc-freshness scripts passed; doc freshness pytest passed; ola_probe --self-test passed; validate_weight_adjustment_coherence.py passed against pinned metarepo schema; cargo test -q -p heimlern-feedback passed; git diff --check passed.
Post-merge validation on Heimlern origin/main af1c66bf7aca5b7b2c338e2f75ab690b43ac6ea3 repeated the same focused Python, schema, Rust and diff checks successfully.
